title: Mario Mash-Up Music (Reactive Music)
description: This resource pack adds music from various Mario games to Minecraft! It's meant to be used in  tandem with the Reactive Music mod!
body:
# **Mario Mash-Up Music**

With remastered songs, to spinoffs & classics, this pack has it all! Make sure to use this alongside the Reactive Music mod! I'll be updating the pack with new songs as time goes by and add modded biome support(Should work now but can be buggy). If you'd like to suggest new songs or report bugs, make sure to join the Reactive Music discord and send them in my thread! 
# **Games Included**

- Mario Odyssey
- Mario Wonder
- New Super Mario 
- Super Mario Maker
- Mario Party
- Luigi's Mansion
- Mario & Luigi Bowsers Inside Story
- Mario Kart World
- Mario Sluggers
- Mario RPG
- Mario 64
- Mario Galaxy 1 & 2
- Paper Mario 
- Captain Toad
- Yoshi's Woolly World

# **Dependency**
https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music

# **Installation**
- Add to resourcepack folder
- Run /reactivemusic in-game (or click on Reactive Music through mod menu)
- Select the music pack
- Enjoy the songs!
